full_text:
Zhuge Qiao (Bosong) 諸葛喬 (伯鬆)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhuge Qiao (諸葛喬), styledBosong (伯鬆). Famed in his own time, lacked brother’s talent but had superior disposition. Zhuge Qiao was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom. Zhuge Qiao lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
